workflow_runs.title: Implement issue 9 skills-first slash workflow surface
workflow_runs.next_action: Ask whether grilling is complete enough to move into PRD/issues for implementation.
workflow_runs.decision: First implementation slice: workflow_intake must produce visible ECC proof before grilling. This includes loaded ECC files, loaded workflow/concept files, premise lock, context manifest, and first context-aware grilling question. This blocks blind questions and blind implementation.
